title: Container-Native Production Deployment (Kubernetes)
description: End-to-end route for deploying a containerised Node.js or Next.js app to Kubernetes with CI/CD, rolling updates, and production observability.

steps.description: Containerize the app with a production multi-stage Dockerfile and health check
Set up CI to build, test, and push the Docker image to the registry on every push
Create K8s manifests (Deployment, Service, Ingress, HPA) and configure rolling updates
Add Sentry error tracking so crashes surface immediately in production
